base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of whip_strip_isolated — a projectile from 1986 castlevania. Isolated whip-chain sprites — 9 frames of whip in motion extracted from Simon's body, usable as standalone projectile/effect overlay. Covers 3 whip levels × short/mid/long extension pose. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Isolated whip-chain sprites — 9 frames of whip in motion extracted from Simon's body, usable as standalone projectile/effect overlay. Covers 3 whip levels × short/mid/long extension pose
